title: NANA Supports ANC Eligibility for CARES Act Relief Funding
summary: As the world faces a global pandemic, NANA stands in support of our shareholders, region, state and nation. Under the CARES Act, passed by Congress on March 25 and signed into law two days later, Alaska Native corporations (ANCs) are eligible for funding to help navigate the health and economic impacts of the COVID-19 outbre...
